scripts.dev:backend: cross-env NODE_ENV=development ALLOW_INSECURE_DEFAULTS=true JWT_SECRET=CHANGE_ME_DEV_SECRET ADMIN_PASSWORD=1234 DATABASE_PATH=./.dev-data/applauncher.db UPLOAD_PATH=./.dev-data/uploads/icons npm run dev --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
